case_title: DEYRO ROBERT F. VS RIVEL TRINIDAD

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,700.00 FILED BY DEYRO ROBERT F. AS TO DEFENDANT RIVEL TRINIDAD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-08-1994 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
PLNTF. NEED TO PAY $5.00 MORE FOR THE CLAIM. HE ON LY PAID $10.00 BY MISTAKE. DO NOT CALENDAR THE HEARING UNTIL THE FEE IS PAID.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RIVEL TRINIDAD
2ND NOTICE TO PLNTF. TO MAKE ARRANGMENT TO PAY THE COURT $5.00 MORE DOLLARS FOR FILING FEE. NO RESPON E AS TO 7/28/94. CASE WILL NOT BE CALENDAR.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEYRO ROBERT F. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RIVEL TRINIDAD DISMISSED, LACK OF JURISDICTION. DEFENDANT FILED BANKRUPTCY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
